# thundercompute_templates (Data Source)

Lists available Thunder Compute instance templates.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thundercompute_templates" "available" {}

output "available_templates" {
  value = data.thundercompute_templates.available.templates
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `templates` (Attributes Map) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--templates))

<a id="nestedatt--templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `templates`

Read-Only:

- `default_cores` (Number) Default vCPU core count.
- `default_gpu_type` (String) Default GPU type for this template.
- `default_num_gpus` (Number) Default number of GPUs.
- `default_storage` (Number) Default storage in GB.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable template name.
- `extended_description` (String) Detailed template description.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default template.
- `startup_minutes` (Number) Estimated startup time in minutes.
- `version` (Number) Template version number.
